hero.name: Abel Mbomnda
hero.role: Computer Science Student | Aspiring Software Developer
hero.tagline: Building polished digital experiences with structure, clarity, and technical ambition.
hero.intro: I create clean, modern, and purposeful projects that blend software development, problem solving, and strong presentation. My goal is to keep growing as a developer while building work that feels professional and memorable.

about.title: A developer-in-progress with a strong eye for structure and presentation
about.description: I am a Computer Science student who enjoys turning ideas into polished digital experiences. My interests include software development, web interfaces, technical problem solving, and database-centered projects. I care about writing organized code, building projects with purpose, and presenting my work in a way that feels premium, clear, and professional.
points: Focused on steady growth in software engineering, frontend development, and technical project building.
Comfortable blending technical structure with creativity and clean visual design.
Driven by discipline, ambition, and a desire to create work that stands out for quality.

projects.title: NeuralCards
projects.description: A flashcard and study platform concept focused on clean generation, organization, and study workflows for learners.

projects.title: Soccer DBMS
projects.description: A structured football database project for modeling clubs, players, fixtures, contracts, and core competition data.

experience.title: Honors Commons Assistant

Assisted with honors event planning, ensuring all required tools and personnel were present.

experience.title: Research Student
